moderators.language_notes: Multiple language support found across different resources

evidence.API_evidence: VIVE AI Glasses SDK provides API access with methods like connect(), disconnect(), captureImage(), startVideoStreaming(), etc. VIVEPORT SDK provides multiple APIs including DRM API, Session Token API, User Profile API, IAP API, etc.
evidence.SDK_evidence: VIVE OpenXR SDK for Unity and Unreal, VIVE Wave SDK, VIVEPORT SDK, VIVE AI Glasses SDK for iOS and Android. GitHub repositories show C# and C++ implementations.
evidence.AI_evidence: No AI model APIs, agents, or AI-specific development tools found in the developer portal content.
evidence.language_evidence: Documentation available in English, Traditional Chinese, and Simplified Chinese. Multiple country/region selectors found throughout the portal.

coding_notes: Platform provides comprehensive VR/XR development resources including OpenXR standard support, multiple SDKs, extensive documentation, GitHub repositories, Discord community, forums, blog, help support, FAQ, and VIVEPORT app store. Privacy policy and cookie policy provide data governance. No role-based access control found - appears to be open access to all developers.
